subject: refactor(hacks): replace setTimeout timing guess; add eslint-disable reasons
body:
hacks trigger pass:

- SaveLoadModal.jsx: Replaced setTimeout(..., 50) focus-after-modal-open
  with requestAnimationFrame. The 50ms was a timing guess to win a race
  against <dialog>.showModal()'s native auto-focus; rAF is the semantic
  browser API for "run after the next layout/paint", which is exactly
  when we want to override the dialog's initial focus.

- App.jsx:293 and BottomSheet.jsx:88: Added `--` reason suffixes to two
  `eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps` comments.
  CLAUDE.md AI notes mandate this format so the WHY travels with the
  suppression instead of being siloed in adjacent comment lines.

Scan clean on: TODO/FIXME/HACK/XXX markers, @ts-ignore/@ts-expect-error,
`any` escapes framed as temporary, and legacy/backcompat shims. Existing
setTimeout usages elsewhere are legitimate UX timings (long-press,
auto-dismiss, orientation debounce, documented PWA-install settle, etc.).

Tags: refactor, focus-management, eslint, tidy
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: clean-sweep-2026-04
Semver: patch
